name: Alaska Silver Corp.
business: Alaska Silver Corp. is a mineral exploration company. It explores for gold, silver, copper, lead, and zinc in Alaska. The company has no operating revenues and holds mineral claims in the Illinois Creek district.

exposures.sentence: Our portfolio consists of five mineral deposits, which contain gold, silver, copper, lead, and zinc at varying stages of exploration and deposit styles, including a Carbonate Replacement Deposit ( CRD ) and a past-producing oxide gold mine.

catalysts.sentence: On March 21, 2026 we repaid $1,320,000, including accrued interest, under the terms of the Loan.
On March 9, 2026 the Company announced that it has converted all of its proportionate voting shares to subordinate voting shares.
